recent_posts.title: The Brains Behind the Bots: Exploring AI in Robotics with MakerWorks
recent_posts.short_description: Uncover the secrets of AI in robotics! Learn about machine learning, neural networks, and how robots get their 'smart brain'.

recent_posts.title: Computer Vision for Robotics: Giving Robots the Power to See
recent_posts.short_description: Discover computer vision for robotics! Learn how robots 'see' with object detection, image recognition, and OpenCV. Essential for STEM learners.

recent_posts.short_description: Dive into the world of humanoid robots and AI! Learn about Atlas, Optimus, their future applications, and how to start your robotics journey.

recent_posts.short_description: Dive into autonomous vehicles! Discover how self-driving cars work with LiDAR, sensor fusion, and AI. A guide for young innovators.
